programme.title: The Wedding Stalker
programme.desc: A dressmaker longs to have a wedding of her own with the man of her dreams. And she will stop at nothing to have it - even if it means killing his bride to be.

programme.title: Another Mother
programme.desc: (2020) Psychological thriller with Alex McKenna. A woman gets engaged to a man with a young daughter, but their happiness is threatened by the girl's biological mother, who resorts to deadly measures.

programme.title: Dangerous Bestie
programme.desc: (2018) Tense thriller starring Rosslyn Luke. Happy to be reunited at first, a woman quickly realises her former best friend has sinister plans to hold her and her family hostage.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: (2008) Mystery-thriller starring Lindsay Price. A woman inherits a family summer house haunted by a centuries-old curse, leading to a series of strange events that threaten her life.

programme.title: The Killer Downstairs
programme.desc: (2019) Disturbing thriller starring Cindy Busby. Alison thinks she's won the tenancy lottery when the seemingly perfect James moves into her basement. But some house rules are about to be broken...

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time.

programme.title: Sniper Elite
programme.desc: A squad of elite human soldiers faces down a powerful and deadly extraterrestrial army. Starring Kevin Sorbo (2014)

programme.title: House of Darkness
programme.desc: (2002) Supernatural horror with Kate Bosworth and Justin Long. A man accompanies a mysterious woman to her secluded estate, but shadowy figures make it clear he isn't welcome.

programme.title: Outlaws and Angels
programme.desc: (2016) Tense western starring Chad Michael Murray and Luke Wilson. A pastor's family home provides the perfect hideout for three violent fugitives. A long night of cat and mouse games beckons...

programme.title: Wrangler
programme.desc: (1989) Western with Jeff Fahey. In Australia's untamed outback, a woman will stop at nothing to save her family's ranch, while two rival suitors will risk everything to win her heart...

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: A rescue operation is launched when a leisure helicopter carrying a young family comes down in a National Park, and a mountain hiker raises the alarm when he is injured by a giant boulder. S5Ep1

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Air Rescue are called to locate a father and his two young sons who are trapped in an overturned fishing boat at sea, and three surfer friends are reported missing in challenging conditions. S5Ep2

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: A rescue crew fly to the remote Babel Island to help a man who is suffering from chest pains, and an out-of-control car pins a grandmother to a wall, crushing her foot and pelvis. S5Ep3

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: A Gold Coast holidaymaker is caught in a deadly ocean rip current, a skydiver is airlifted to hospital, and a groom-to-be is left gripping to the side of a mountain with a suspected broken leg. S5Ep4

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: An injured man clings to the rocks after falling into the ocean, and a head-on car collision leaves two tourists fighting for their lives. S5Ep5

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: A group of amateur scuba divers find themselves in trouble when their boat capsizes, and a son tries to get urgent help for his dad after a nasty trailbike accident. S5Ep6

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Burning Lies
programme.desc: (2021) Tense psychological thriller with Annika Foster. A woman falls for a handsome firefighter who saves her life, but soon discovers that his overprotective nature can get obsessive - and deadly.

programme.title: Island Of Shadows
programme.desc: (2020) Dark thriller with Anna Hopkins. While staying in a house that once belonged to her family, a true-crime author unravels a sinister truth lurking in the shadows. Family secrets can be deadly...

programme.title: A Teacher's Obsession
programme.desc: (2015) Obsessive drama with Mia Rose Frampton. A troubled high school student meets a teacher who offers to help her avoid probation, but her methods prove unethical, disturbing and ultimately deadly.
